_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PANEL
name: Windrose
author: custom@example.com
description: Windrose is a pirate co-op survival adventure. Sail the seas, build your base, craft gear and fight bosses with up to 10 players. This egg uses Proton 8 for Linux compatibility.
startup: find /home/container -name "xalia.exe" -delete 2>/dev/null; find /home/container -name "xalia.dll" -delete 2>/dev/null; rm -f ./R5/Saved/Logs/R5.log; PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 PROTON_NO_FSYNC=1 proton run ./R5/Binaries/Win64/WindroseServer-Win64-Shipping.exe -log -nullrhi -MULTIHOME=0.0.0.0 -PORT={{SERVER_PORT}} -QUERYPORT={{SERVER_PORT_2}} & WR_PID=$! ; sleep 30 ; tail -n0 -F ./R5/Saved/Logs/R5.log & wait $WR_PID

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Windrose Dedicated Server - Install Script

clear
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
NC='\033[0m'

echo -e "${BLUE}-------------------------------------------------${NC}"
echo -e "${YELLOW}Windrose Dedicated Server - Install Script${NC}"
echo -e "${BLUE}-------------------------------------------------${NC}"

if [[ "${STEAM_USER}" == "" ]] || [[ "${STEAM_PASS}" == "" ]]; then
    echo -e "Steam user is not set. Using anonymous login."
    STEAM_USER=anonymous
    STEAM_PASS=""
    STEAM_AUTH=""
else
    echo -e "Logging in as: ${STEAM_USER}"
fi

echo -e "${BLUE}-------------------------------------------------${NC}"
echo -e "${YELLOW}Downloading SteamCMD...${NC}"
echo -e "${BLUE}-------------------------------------------------${NC}"

cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

echo -e "${BLUE}-------------------------------------------------${NC}"
echo -e "${YELLOW}Installing Windrose Dedicated Server...${NC}"
echo -e "${BLUE}-------------------------------------------------${NC}"

./steamcmd.sh \
    +force_install_dir /mnt/server \
    +login ${STEAM_USER} ${STEAM_PASS} ${STEAM_AUTH} \
    +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows \
    +app_update 1007 \
    +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID} validate \
    +quit

echo -e "${GREEN}Install complete!${NC}"

mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so

## Create .pteroignore to only back up necessary files
if [ ! -f /mnt/server/.pteroignore ]; then
    echo "Creating default .pteroignore"
    cat << 'EOF' > /mnt/server/.pteroignore
*
!R5/ServerDescription.json
!R5/Saved/SaveProfiles/Default/RocksDB/0.10.0/Worlds/*
EOF
fi

echo -e "${BLUE}-------------------------------------------------${NC}"
echo -e "${GREEN}Windrose installation complete!${NC}"
echo -e "${BLUE}-------------------------------------------------${NC}"

variables.name: [SYSTEM] Steam App ID
variables.description: Steam App ID for Windrose Dedicated Server. Do not change.

variables.name: [SYSTEM] Windows Install
variables.description: Forces SteamCMD to download Windows branch. Do not change.

variables.name: [STEAM] Auto Update
variables.description: Automatically update server on startup. Set to 0 to disable.

variables.name: [SERVER] Invite Code
variables.description: Custom invite code (6-20 alphanumeric characters). Leave blank to auto-generate.

variables.name: [SERVER] Password Protected
variables.description: Set to 1 to require a password to join.

variables.name: [SERVER] Password
variables.description: Join password. Only used if Password Protected is enabled.

variables.name: [SERVER] World Island ID
variables.description: ID of the world to load on startup. Found in WorldDescription.json on the server. Leave blank to use default world.
